headline: Heat breaks — hill potato bags this morning before storms.
weather_notes: Do all outdoor work before 9 AM today — Red Flag Warning active through midnight with gusty winds and extreme low humidity.
Skip both zone runs through Sunday — zone 2 ran yesterday and 50% storm chance today plus 41% Sunday cover the moisture gap.
Reassess irrigation Monday — check soil after weekend storms clear before scheduling the next zone run.

surfaced_tasks.title: Finish hilling the potato bags
surfaced_tasks.reason: 2 days overdue — Jun 24 log confirms 3 bags still need one final hill; today's 78°F break is the first practical outdoor window after a week of 95-99°F heat.

surfaced_tasks.title: Harvest check
surfaced_tasks.reason: Five consecutive days of 95-99°F heat can accelerate garlic maturation by a week — check leaf browning on w2 now rather than waiting for the Jul 5 due date to avoid missing the harvest window.

surfaced_tasks.title: Harvest check
surfaced_tasks.reason: Same heat-acceleration risk as w2 — check Italian Red leaf browning alongside w2 this weekend to confirm whether the Jul 15 harvest window has shifted earlier.
